dm_location: Volume 1 Written Statement, Chapter 16 — Development Management Standards
residential_density_dph: Site-by-site; higher densities encouraged at accessible locations; no fixed countywide uph table
separation_distance_m: 22 m separation between opposing rear first-floor windows; ground-floor window not less than 1 m from boundary (CPO 16.14)
private_open_space: Inner urban infill dwellings 25 m²; rear private garden not less than 11 m in depth (CPO 16.20)
public_open_space_pct: in general 15% of gross site area for multifunctional open space
car_parking_dwelling: Residential 1.00 per dwelling (countywide & town centre); visitor 1 per 3 dwellings
trigger_AA: Habitats Directive: plans/projects likely to affect Natura 2000 screened for AA; plan-level AA carried out
trigger_EIA: Applied per national thresholds; EIA Sub-Threshold Development Guidelines (2003) for screening
trigger_FRA: SFRA required; site-specific FRA; Justification Test per 2009 Guidelines
trigger_AHIA: Protected structures/conservation areas in built-heritage chapter; AHIA expectation for affecting works
trigger_TTA: TTA required for larger developments per the plan's transport policies
notes: Standards expressed as CPO 16.x policy objectives. CPO 16.24 increased density in Athlone Regional Centre & Mullingar (compact sites ~0.5 ha). Larger houses (>200 m²) require specific design solutions. Most AA/EIA/SFRA detail in environment/core-strategy chapters.
